title: Mall Sources Registry (supported-stores)
description: Single source of truth for the Mall source registry. Schema v2.0 (2026-05-29) extends v1.0 with provenance, license, local_dir_name, plugin-mall self-entry per PLAN-mall-automation.md v3 / ADR-008.

mallRoot.description: Default local clone root used by mall-clone.cjs.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must be unique across the registry.

remote.description: git clone URL. Null means upstream is lost; bootstrap skips with noRemote count.

pluginDir.description: Path within the source repo where plugins live. '.' = repo root. Each immediate subdirectory is scanned as a potential plugin.

quality.description: Editorial tier tag (legacy field name; in v3 catalog this surfaces as 'tier'). Informational; trust score is computed from signals, not from this tag.

provenance.description: True only for first-party stores (the Mall itself). Adds +50 to per-plugin trust score in v3 catalog. Encodes 'this plugin has been touched by Supervisor's editorial process'.

license.description: SPDX license identifier where known. Drives the license-clarity signal in v3 trust scoring.

local_dir_name.description: Optional override when the local clone directory name differs from the registry 'name' (e.g. karpathy-skills registered, andrej-karpathy-skills on disk to match upstream repo).

verified.description: Whether the remote URL has been confirmed via git ls-remote.
